import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import AdminLogin from'./AdminLogin';import AdminDashboard from'./AdminDashboard';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AdminRouter(){const[isAdminAuthenticated,setIsAdminAuthenticated]=useState(()=>{// Check if admin is already logged in

if(!isAdminAuthenticated){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AdminLogin,{onAdminLoginSuccess:handleAdminLoginSuccess});}// If authenticated, show dashboard
